# FastXLSX 任务拆分设计

## 目标

这份文档是执行层任务拆分入口，用来避免把 `P4`、`P7` 这类大任务直接交给一次实现。

`TASK_PLAN.md` 负责长期路线图，`NEXT_STEPS.md` 负责下一轮推进顺序；本文件负责把
当前优先级拆成可讨论、可验收、可并行的小任务。后续执行时，应先在本文件选定一个
最小任务，再进入设计或实现。

## 当前阶段任务重设计

截至 2026-06-12，旧的 `P3 → P4.0 → P4 → P5 → P6 → P7 → P8`
线性顺序已经不能再作为下一步执行入口：这些阶段中的多个基础切片已经落地。
后续执行应从下面的事实驱动队列选择最小任务，旧 P 编号只作为历史索引和能力归档。

```text
C0 状态校准与验证基线
→ C1 当前 public WorkbookEditor Patch facade 硬化
→ C2 Patch preservation / dependency audit 缺口补齐
→ C3 public editor 扩展决策门
→ C4 In-memory random editor 内部到 public 的窄切片
→ C5 大 worksheet 低内存 rewrite 真正流式化
→ C6 ZIP/backend、sharedStrings、benchmark、streaming hot path 支撑线
→ C7 release / packaging / public wording gate
```

### 当前功能 / API 优先推进口径

截至 2026-06-15，下一轮默认入口先切回 public API 与功能契约设计；性能、
benchmark、ZIP/backend 和 streaming hot path 继续留在 C6 支撑线，只在功能变更触碰
热路径、资源边界或 release 宣称时作为验证输入。执行时仍从 C0-C7 队列选任务，
但应优先把下面这些功能 lane 拆成最小切片，再进入代码实现。

F0 `WorkbookEditor` public facade 收口：
- 目标：固定当前 Patch facade 的 source catalog / planned catalog inspection、
  pending-save diagnostics、replacement guardrail 和 missing-sheet preflight 语义。
- 已落地：`source_worksheet_names()` / `has_source_worksheet()`、
  `pending_replacement_worksheet_names()` / `has_pending_replacement()`、
  rename 后 planned catalog lookup、replacement diagnostics 迁移，以及缺失 sheet
  先按 current planned catalog 失败的 public preflight。
- 后续候选：补 README / API 文档中的 source-vs-planned 示例、失败诊断说明、
  save-as smoke 示例；只暴露 workbook / worksheet 语言，不暴露 internal
  `EditPlan`、`PackageEditor` 或 relationship graph。
- 本轮推进：README 已新增 current planned catalog、source catalog 和 pending
  replacement diagnostics 的 `WorkbookEditor` Patch facade 示例；API 设计文档已新增
  功能进入实现前的设计门。README / API-facing docs 已同步 P8.220 ordering 和
  `last_edit_error()` inspection-invariance 说明。

F1 public edit diagnostics 窄扩展：
- 目标：让调用方在 `save_as()` 前能解释当前 queued public edits 的粗粒度状态。
- 首片已落地：`WorkbookEditorWorksheetEditSummary` 和
  `WorkbookEditor::pending_worksheet_edits()`，按 source workbook sheet-catalog order
  汇总 queued public worksheet-level edits 和 dirty materialized `WorksheetEditor`
  sessions，包含 source name、planned name、rename flag、whole-`<sheetData>`
  replacement flag、final queued replacement cell count / memory estimate，以及
  `materialized_dirty`、materialized sparse cell count 和 materialized memory
  estimate；inspection 不触发 flush、不改变 `pending_change_count()`。
- 第二片已落地：`WorkbookEditorWorksheetCatalogEntry` 和
  `WorkbookEditor::worksheet_catalog()`，按 source workbook sheet-catalog order 暴露
  source name 到 current planned name 的 public facade 映射，并标记 rename flag。
- 第三片已落地：`WorkbookEditor::last_edit_error()`，记录最近一次失败 public edit 的
  可读诊断；成功 public edit 会清空，inspection methods 和 `save_as()` 不更新它。
- 后续候选：暂无；F1 当前收口，除非后续使用方提出更具体的 public diagnostics 需求。
- 禁止：不公开 dependency audit 明细对象、不公开 output plan reason、不把
  `ReferencePolicy` 或 internal patch graph 变成稳定 public API。

F2 `WorksheetEditor` / In-memory random editing 首片：
- 目标：在 `WorkbookEditor` facade 下开放小文件 existing-workbook random cell
  editing，同时保持 Streaming / Patch / In-memory 三路径边界清晰。
- 前置：明确 `CellValue`、internal `CellStore`、sharedStrings / styles / formula /
  relationship 的 preserve / audit / fail 边界。
- 当前状态：首个 public slice 已打开；F2.1 internal source-backed worksheet materialization
  已有 worksheet XML chunk/string loader 和 `PackageReader` sheet-name helper
  首片，F2.2 internal `try_cell(row, column)` 读语义已落地，F2.3 首个
  source-loaded `CellStore` -> by-name `sheetData` Patch handoff smoke 已覆盖，
  F2.4 首个 loader dependency guardrail 回归已固定 malformed source style
  attributes 和 unsupported source cell shape 的拒绝策略；explicit source `s="0"`
  现在归一化为 no style handle；workbook-backed canonical non-zero source style
  ids 现在会先验证 source styles.xml `cellXfs` 再作为同 workbook numeric
  passthrough materialize / dirty-project；workbook-backed source sharedStrings
  当前可只读 materialize 为 plain text，invalid sharedStrings metadata / indexes
  仍 fail fast，standalone generic worksheet loaders 仍因缺少 workbook-level
  sharedStrings context 而拒绝 `t="s"`；date-like/custom source cell types remain
  unsupported while source `t="e"` error tokens are opaque materialized values；
  internal
  mutation guardrail 还覆盖坐标校验失败不污染已有 sparse records；
  loader XML entity decoding guardrail 已覆盖 unknown entity、unterminated
  entity、invalid character reference 和 out-of-range character reference 的
  failure-before-return；focused loader 覆盖也已固定 invalid boolean payload
  拒绝；malformed cell reference / attribute guardrail 已覆盖 missing `r`、
  out-of-range `r`、zero-row ref、last-row overflow ref、non-column-first ref、
  unquoted attribute、unterminated attribute 和 invalid row `r` values；inline-string
  shape guardrail 已覆盖 inline text in non-inline cell 和 `t="inlineStr"` cell
  with ordinary `<v>` payload；loader state-machine guardrail 已覆盖 nested cell；
  loader materialization guardrail 已覆盖 `CellStoreOptions::max_cells` 和
  `memory_budget_bytes` enforcement；source-shape guardrail 已覆盖 duplicate source
  cell references、duplicate explicit row numbers 和 duplicate scalar / formula /
  inline-text value wrappers；key attribute guardrail 已覆盖 duplicate `r` / `t`
  attributes inspected by the loader；row/cell-order guardrail 已覆盖
  out-of-order explicit row numbers 和 out-of-order source cell references；
  formula-shape guardrail 已覆盖 unknown source formula attributes 和 empty formula text；
  row-scope guardrail 已覆盖 source cells outside row elements；
  metadata-attribute guardrail 已覆盖 unsupported source row/cell metadata
  attributes；
  value-wrapper attribute guardrail 已覆盖 unsupported scalar `<v>` and inline
  text `<t>` attributes；
  inline-string child-markup guardrail 已覆盖 unsupported rich text runs and
  phonetic metadata；
  tombstone / style-preservation policy gate 已明确当前 `erase_cell()` 只是 remove
  sparse record、`CellValue::blank()` 才是 explicit blank replacement cell，source
  style ids 当前 fail 而不是 preserve / migrate / merge，focused loader test 也覆盖
  explicit default `s="0"` 拒绝；package-backed loader state-hygiene coverage
  now includes corrupt workbook/worksheet ZIP reads, duplicate sheet names,
  missing sheet relationship ids, non-worksheet relationship types, registered
  non-worksheet targets, external targets, URI-qualified targets, and
  load-time `CellStoreOptions::max_cells` / `memory_budget_bytes` guardrail
  failures. P8.378 exposes `WorksheetEditorOptions`,
  `WorkbookEditor::worksheet(name, options)` and borrowed `WorksheetEditor`
  handles with `try_cell()`, `set_cell()`, `erase_cell()`, `cell_count()` and
  `estimated_memory_usage()`. `WorkbookEditor::save_as()` now preflights output
  paths before automatically flushing dirty materialized sessions into the
  Patch plan. Public tests cover source reads, set/erase save-as roundtrip,
  materialization max-cells guard failure hygiene, same-sheet operation mixing,
  and cross-sheet Patch coexistence. P8.379 adds `WorkbookEditor::try_worksheet()`
  and `WorksheetEditor::get_cell()` with public tests for missing-sheet optional
  lookup, non-missing materialization failures, existing-cell reads, missing-cell
  throws, and explicit blank distinction. P8.383 adds
  `WorksheetEditor::has_pending_changes()` as worksheet-local dirty-state
  inspection; it does not flush, increment `WorkbookEditor::pending_change_count()`,
  expose internal Patch state, or update `last_edit_error()`. P8.384 adds an
  owner-generation guard and public regressions so WorksheetEditor handles
  borrowed before `WorkbookEditor` move construction / move assignment are
  invalidated and must be reacquired from the moved-to / assigned-to editor.
  P8.385 adds `WorkbookEditor::pending_materialized_worksheet_names()` so
  callers can inspect dirty materialized sessions by planned sheet name without
  forcing a `save_as()` flush or exposing internal Patch state. P8.386 folds
  dirty materialized sessions into `WorkbookEditor::pending_worksheet_edits()`
  via `materialized_dirty`, materialized sparse cell count, and materialized
  memory estimate fields, while preserving source-order summaries and existing
  Patch-count semantics. P8.387 adds workbook-level aggregate dirty
  materialized cell count and memory-estimate diagnostics without forcing flush,
  changing Patch-count semantics, exposing internal Patch state, or including
  queued whole-`<sheetData>` replacement payloads. P8.388 pins public borrowed
  handle lifetime around `save_as()`: successful or failed `WorkbookEditor::save_as()`
  does not delete or invalidate same-owner `WorksheetEditor` handles; owner move
  / move assignment remains the invalidation boundary. P8.389 adds read-only
  source sharedStrings materialization for public `WorksheetEditor` handles:
  source `t="s"` cells load through existing workbook `xl/sharedStrings.xml`,
  flatten simple rich text to plain text, and still save back as inline strings
  while preserving the source sharedStrings bytes. Standalone worksheet XML /
  chunk loaders still reject `t="s"` because they do not have workbook-level
  sharedStrings context. P8.390 pins the corresponding failure matrix for
  duplicate/invalid sharedStrings relationships, missing or wrong-typed parts,
  malformed sharedStrings XML, and invalid indexes. This still does not add
  non-default `StyleId` support, sharedStrings/style migration, semantic
  metadata sync, relationship repair, or large-file low-memory random editing.
  P8.391 lifts representative invalid sharedStrings metadata cases to the
  public `try_worksheet()` / `worksheet()` facade and proves these failures do
  not dirty materialized state, update `last_edit_error()`, or prevent later
  valid Patch edits. P8.392 reconciles public-header and planning wording with
  that current behavior. P8.393 applies the same public facade state-hygiene
  proof to non-default source style id load failures, including `s="1"` after
  an already loadable source cell. P8.466 later normalizes explicit default
  `s="0"` to no style handle, and P8.467 later locks that exception to exact
  source style tokens only. P8.394 pins
  public facade state hygiene for unsupported source cell shapes and invalid
  boolean payloads (`t="e"`, `t="d"`, invalid `t="b"` value). P8.395 factors
  the repeated public materialization-failure state checks into one helper and
  pins malformed source worksheet XML facade hygiene. P8.396 extends the same
  public facade failure hygiene to source cell-reference validation failures:
  missing cell `r` and row/cell reference mismatch fail before returning a
  handle and do not imply coordinate repair or inference. P8.397 pins source
  formula materialization and formula-shape failure hygiene at the public
  facade: formula text loads as `CellValue::formula(...)`, cached values are
  ignored, and malformed/unsupported formula shapes fail cleanly. P8.398 pins
  public facade hygiene for source inline text/XML entity failures, including
  unknown XML entities, unsupported inline `<t>` attributes, duplicate inline
  text elements, and unknown inline string metadata. P8.399 pins public facade hygiene for
  source row/cell structure and numeric value failures: row/cell metadata
  attributes, duplicate/out-of-order row numbers, out-of-order cell references,
  and invalid numeric payloads fail before returning a handle. P8.400 pins
  public facade hygiene for unsupported source value-wrapper shapes: scalar
  `<v>` attributes, duplicate `<v>` wrappers, inline/scalar wrapper mismatches,
  and cell-internal unsupported markup fail before returning a handle. P8.401
  pins public facade hygiene for XML/entity/attribute parser failures:
  unterminated entities, invalid/out-of-range character references, unquoted
  attributes, and duplicate source attributes fail cleanly. P8.402 pins public
  facade hygiene for source reference boundary failures: out-of-range cell
  columns/rows, zero row references, non-column-first cell references, and
  invalid row numbers fail cleanly. P8.403 pins public facade hygiene for
  source row/cell state-machine failures: rows outside `sheetData`, nested
  rows, cells outside rows, and nested cells fail cleanly. P8.404 pins positive
  public materialization for currently supported source blank, boolean, and
  empty inline-string cells. P8.405 pins empty source worksheet materialization:
  no `sheetData` and self-closing `<sheetData/>` both load as empty sparse
  stores and later dirty projection writes standalone worksheet XML. P8.406
  pins public facade hygiene for worksheet root and `sheetData` boundary
  failures: markup before root, duplicate `sheetData`, duplicate roots, and
  trailing text fail cleanly. P8.407-P8.409 pin source wrapper metadata,
  cell-external comment / processing-instruction projection boundaries, and
  clean read-only materialization no-op save behavior; P8.472-P8.473 extend the
  wrapper boundary to representative relationship-bearing and range/reference
  wrapper metadata. P8.474 materializes simple source inline rich text as
  flattened plain text without preserving run formatting or phonetic/extension
  metadata, while P8.475 pins malformed inline rich text shapes as fail-fast
  hygiene. P8.410-P8.411 pin
  no-op save behavior after failed materialization and missing
  `try_worksheet()` lookup. P8.412-P8.413 split growing test shards to preserve
  the 60s CTest discipline. P8.414 normalizes caller-supplied explicit default
  `StyleId{0}` to no style handle in public `WorksheetEditor` mutations, and
  P8.415 pins row/column overload coordinate guardrails for public reads and
  mutations without adding coordinate inference, clamping, dense reads, or
  large-file random access.

  Historical context:
  P8.285 gate audit froze the next step as public API design docs only, and
  P8.286 now adds a first `WorksheetEditor` public-slice design draft covering
  entry points, options, read/mutation semantics, style/source dependency
  policy, save-as handoff, mixing rules, and failure hygiene. P8.287 now adds
  an acceptance matrix and open-decision checklist, recommending a narrow first
  slice with row/column `try_cell()` first, non-default `StyleId` rejection,
  and explicit rejection of ambiguous rename / whole-sheet replacement mixing
  on materialized sheets. P8.288 now adds future Doxygen / README wording
  drafts in the API design document, explicitly marked as unavailable in current
  public headers. P8.289 now adds save-as public-facade acceptance design for
  dirty tracking, sparse projection, package preservation, calc policy,
  dimension policy, operation mixing, path guards, and diagnostics. P8.290 now
  adds the implementation preflight checklist for naming, handle ownership,
  first-slice scope, style/dependency policy, dimension/calc policy,
  diagnostics, tests, shard budget, and validation gates. P8.291 now splits the
  package-editor F2 CellStore tests into `fastxlsx.package_editor.cellstore` and
  sheetData catalog/guardrail/linked-object coverage into
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.sheetdata-catalog`,
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.sheetdata-guards`, and
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.sheetdata-linked`, leaving
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.sheetdata` focused on base sheetData / by-name
  coverage. P8.292 now records a review-only public-header audit: current
  public headers still expose only the landed `WorkbookEditor` Patch facade, and
  `WorksheetEditor` / random-edit symbols remain design-only. P8.294 now splits
  the package-editor preservation-core CTest budget into
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.preservation-removal`,
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.preservation-resources`, and
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.preservation-comments` so heavy preservation coverage
  remains below the 60s shard discipline. P8.295 now covers the same no-op
  `WorkbookEditor::save_as()` failed-edit diagnostic contract for the
  `rename_sheet()` public edit path, not only `replace_sheet_data()`. The
  README API-facing summary now also records the split `fastxlsx.package_editor.*`
  CTest shape and no-op save failed-rename diagnostic behavior. The
  moved-from `WorkbookEditor` public diagnostics are now fully pinned for
  false/zero/empty return values where the API is specified not to throw. P8.298
  now also pins moved-to `WorkbookEditor` behavior with queued replacement,
  rename, and failed-edit diagnostics. P8.299 adds matching move-assignment
  coverage: assigned queued public state replaces the previous target state
  without committing, merging, or leaking discarded edits. P8.300 covers the
  clean-source move-assignment boundary, proving a dirty target's queued state
  and diagnostic are cleared rather than retained. P8.301 syncs public Doxygen
  and API design audit wording for move construction and move assignment so docs
  match the verified ownership-transfer behavior. P8.302 covers clean move
  construction, proving an editor with no queued public edits remains a no-op
  save-as roundtrip after ownership transfer. P8.303 covers move assignment into
  a moved-from target, proving the target can receive a valid assigned session
  instead of remaining permanently unusable. P8.304 covers move-construction of
  `WorkbookEditorOptions`, proving replacement guardrails survive ownership
  transfer and remain documented as part of move state. P8.305 covers
  move-assignment replacement of target-side options, proving source guardrails
  replace target guardrails along with the rest of the editor session. P8.306
  and P8.307 extend that options coverage to `replacement_memory_budget_bytes`
  for move construction and move assignment. P8.308 covers the complementary
  default-source move-assignment case, proving target-side strict replacement
  guardrails are cleared when the assigned source editor uses defaults. P8.310
  records the future `WorksheetEditor` implementation gate checklist, keeping
  options, handle lifetime, diagnostics, save-as handoff, and mixing policy
  explicit before any public header is added. P8.311 resolves the first
  materialization diagnostic rule: load/materialization failures should throw
  `FastXlsxError` and must not update current edit-only `last_edit_error()`.
  P8.312 freezes the options naming / passing-location decision:
  `WorksheetEditorOptions` is the future per-materialization options type for
  `worksheet(name, options)` / `try_worksheet(name, options)`, with
  `max_cells` and `memory_budget_bytes` separate from current
  `WorkbookEditorOptions` replacement-payload guardrails. P8.313 freezes the
  first handle lifetime / operation-mixing decision: `WorkbookEditor` owns
  materialized worksheet state, public calls return borrowed handles, moving the
  owner invalidates previously obtained references, repeated materialization
  requires matching options, and ambiguous rename / whole-sheet replacement
  mixing is rejected before state changes. P8.384 locks this down in the public
  by-value handle implementation with generation-based invalidation after move
  construction and move assignment. P8.314 freezes the save-as handoff
  behavior decision: materialization alone is not pending edit state, dirty
  sparse stores persist only through `WorkbookEditor::save_as()`, top-level
  worksheet `<dimension>` must be refreshed for emitted cell extents before any
  public header, and other range metadata remains audit / fail / preserve only.
  P8.315 adds the first implementation evidence for that dimension requirement:
  internal `cell_store_dimension_reference()` computes the sparse-store emitted
  extent, including shrink-after-erase and explicit blank records, without
  changing current Patch facade semantics. P8.316 connects that projection to
  internal `cell_store_worksheet_chunk_source()` as a minimal full worksheet XML
  chunk stream for future in-memory save-as handoff evidence, still without
  changing current Patch facade semantics. P8.317-P8.319 cover current
  `WorkbookEditor` rename-back public-facade diagnostics, including replacement
  diagnostics migration, rename-only chain-back summary cleanup, and
  restored-name replacement usability after a later failed rename. P8.320 closes
  the wording-only public gate across README / API docs / task docs, keeping
  future `WorksheetEditor` names out of public headers until a deliberate
  implementation-and-test task opens them. P8.321 adds internal
  planned-catalog handoff evidence for source-loaded `CellStore` after queued
  sheet rename: the old source name fails without mutating the rename, and the
  planned new name succeeds. P8.322 adds the same guardrail for full worksheet
  `CellStore` projection, including staged `StreamRewrite` and refreshed
  `<dimension>` evidence. P8.323 proves those old-source-name preflight failures
  do not consume prepared `CellStore` chunk sources before planned-name retry.
  P8.324 adds queued-worksheet follow-up handoff evidence: source-loaded
  `CellStore` sheetData patch applies to the planned worksheet wrapper and does
  not resurrect source-only payload. P8.325 adds the paired full worksheet
  projection evidence: later source-loaded `CellStore` worksheet chunks replace
  the prior queued wrapper and refresh `<dimension>`. P8.326 adds the combined
  queued rename + queued worksheet replacement guardrail: old source name fails
  before chunk consumption, and planned name patches the queued wrapper. P8.327
  adds the paired full worksheet projection guardrail for that combined setup:
  old source name still consumes no chunks, and planned name replaces the queued
  wrapper while preserving the renamed catalog and refreshing `<dimension>`.
  P8.328 adds save-as failure hygiene for that combined staged state:
  source-overwrite rejection preserves staged chunks / pending edits, and a
  later safe output path still saves. P8.329 extends the same guard to
  path-equivalent source-overwrite attempts. P8.330 extends it to empty output
  path rejection. P8.331 extends it to missing output parent rejection. P8.332
  / P8.333 extend it to non-directory output parent and existing-directory
  output rejection. P8.334 adds writer/backend failure hygiene for the same
  combined staged state. P8.335 adds successful-save staged-chunk reuse evidence
  for a second safe output path. P8.336 adds save-time source-copy temp-size
  failure hygiene for the same combined staged state. P8.337 adds the matching
  missing source-copy temp-file failure hygiene, P8.338 adds the matching
  source-copy temp CRC failure hygiene, P8.339 adds a workbook planned-removal
  preflight guard for source-loaded full worksheet chunks, and P8.340 adds an
  invalid planned workbook catalog preflight guard for the same chunk handoff.
  P8.341 adds the matching wrong-namespace planned catalog id guard, P8.342
  adds the plain unqualified planned catalog id guard, and P8.343 adds the
  unregistered planned worksheet target guard.
  The
  internal evidence became broad enough to stop adding duplicate loader-negative
  cases by default and P8.378 opened the first public header slice.
- F2.1 load/materialization contract：in-memory editor 只能显式加载小
  worksheet，必须受 workbook-level / worksheet-level `max_cells` 和
  `memory_budget_bytes` guardrail 保护；加载失败必须在污染 editor state 前抛出
  `FastXlsxError`，不能静默得到半加载 workbook。当前 internal
  `load_cell_store_from_worksheet_chunks()` / `load_cell_store_from_worksheet_xml()`
  只覆盖 number、boolean、inline string、formula text 和 explicit blank，并在
  sharedStrings、style id 和 unsupported cell shape 上 fail；workbook-backed
  `load_cell_store_from_workbook_sheet()` 还可通过 existing
  `xl/sharedStrings.xml` 只读 materialize source `t="s"` cells as text。当前
  package-level 回归还验证 source worksheet 出现 `s="..."` style id（包括已读到
  前置普通 cell 后出现的 explicit default `s="0"`）、unsupported cell type 或
  invalid boolean payload 时 loader 失败；sharedStrings negative matrix 则覆盖
  missing/empty/non-numeric/out-of-range indexes、duplicate/external/query/fragment
  relationships、missing/wrong-typed parts 和 malformed sharedStrings XML 的
  fail-fast 行为。这些负例都覆盖已读到前置普通 cell 后仍不暴露 partial
  `CellStore`，且 `PackageReader` 仍可继续读取原 entry。package-backed 加载期
  `max_cells` / `memory_budget_bytes` overflow 也已覆盖失败前不污染
  `PackageEditor` 状态和 aggregate output plan copy-original。它们不是
  public random editor。
- F2.2 mutation model：`try_cell(ref)` 的 empty 表示 sparse store 中没有 cell；
  `set_cell(ref, CellValue)` 覆盖该 cell 的 active value；`erase_cell(ref)` 删除
  active record；`CellValue::blank()` 是 caller 明确写入 blank/clear 候选值。
  当前 internal `CellStore::try_cell(row, column)` 返回 nullptr 表示 missing，
  explicit blank 返回非空 `CellRecord` 且 kind 为 `Blank`；`find_cell()` 只是兼容
  alias。blank 是否写出 empty styled cell、是否保留 style、是否生成 tombstone，
  必须等 F2.3/F2.4 save-as contract 固化后再实现，不能在第一版里含糊处理。
- F2.3 save-as handoff：existing-package backed in-memory edits 仍必须通过
  `save_as(output_path)` 写到新路径，未修改 package entries 和 unknown entries
  默认 copy-original；cell edits 投影到 worksheet part rewrite 时必须记录
  sharedStrings、styles、formulas、calc metadata、range metadata 和 worksheet `.rels`
  的 preserve / audit / fail 策略。第一版不得承诺 sharedStrings 索引迁移、
  style id migration、relationship repair 或 calcChain rebuild。当前 internal smoke
  只证明 source sheet 可加载成 `CellStore`，小范围 `set_cell` / `erase_cell` /
  explicit blank mutation 可经现有 by-name `sheetData` Patch helper 输出，并保留
  unknown bytes / 清理 stale calcChain；后续回归还固定了当前 source-loaded
  projection policy：`CellValue::blank()` 覆盖 source cell 时输出空 `<c>`，而
  `erase_cell()` 从 replacement `<sheetData>` 中省略该 cell。这还不是 public
  in-memory save-as API，也不是 tombstone/style-preservation policy。
- F2.4 public API gate：只有 internal loader、mutation state、guardrail
  no-state-pollution、source dependency fail policy 和 save-as handoff 都有 focused
  tests 后，才允许新增
  `WorkbookEditor::worksheet()` / `try_worksheet()` 和 `WorksheetEditor` public
  header；否则继续停留在 docs + internal foundations。当前 P8.285 audit 结论是：
  可以进入 public API design spec 起草，但实现门仍未通过；P8.312 / P8.313 已
  决定 options 命名 / 传参位置和首版 handle lifetime / operation mixing 规则，
  剩余缺口主要是 source-backed random edits 到 `save_as()` 的完整 public facade
  contract、最终 Doxygen / README wording，以及对应 public tests。
- P8.370 已完成 public `WorksheetEditor` header 前的 review-only API diff 和
  current public/internal/future API 状态矩阵；下一最小候选可转向
  `fastxlsx.package_editor.cellstore` / `sheetdata` shard 的验证记录，或继续补真实
  uncovered save-as / operation-mixing 缺口；不改 header，
  除非先补齐 save-as projection / dimension refresh implementation evidence 和 public
  facade tests。P8.312 已完成 options 命名和传参位置决策；
  P8.313 已完成 handle ownership / invalidation 与首版 operation mixing policy。
  P8.314 已完成 save-as handoff behavior design，P8.315 已补首个 CellStore dimension
  projection implementation evidence，P8.316 已把 projection 接到 internal minimal
  worksheet chunk-source handoff，P8.317-P8.319 已补当前 `WorkbookEditor`
  rename-back public diagnostics 和 restored-name replacement 可用性，P8.320 已完成
  public wording gate，P8.321 已补 source-loaded `CellStore` 经 queued rename 后必须
  按 planned catalog name handoff 的 internal guardrail，P8.322 已把同一 guardrail
  扩展到 full worksheet chunk projection 和 refreshed dimension，P8.323 已验证
  old-name preflight failure 不会 drain prepared chunk source，P8.324 已补 queued
  whole worksheet replacement 后的 source-loaded `CellStore` follow-up sheetData
  handoff，P8.325 已补 paired full worksheet projection 会替换 prior planned wrapper
  并刷新 `<dimension>`，P8.326 已补 queued rename + queued worksheet replacement
  组合下必须按 planned name handoff 且 old-name failure 不消费 chunk source，P8.327
  已补同一组合下 full worksheet projection 会替换 queued wrapper、保留 renamed catalog
  并刷新 `<dimension>`，P8.328 已补该 combined staged state 的 source-overwrite
  `save_as()` failure hygiene，确认 staged chunks / pending edits 保留且后续安全路径仍可保存，P8.329 已把同一 guard 扩展到 path-equivalent source-overwrite，P8.330 已扩展到 empty output path rejection，P8.331 已扩展到 missing output parent rejection，P8.332 / P8.333 已扩展到 non-directory output parent 和 existing-directory output rejection，P8.334 已补同一 combined staged state 下 writer/backend failure 不覆盖既有输出、不泄漏临时文件且不丢 staged chunks，P8.335 已补 successful safe `save_as()` 后 staged chunks 可复用于第二个安全输出路径，P8.336 已补同一 combined staged state 下 source-copy temp size failure 不覆盖既有输出、不泄漏临时文件且不丢 staged chunks，P8.337 已补 missing source-copy temp-file failure 的同类卫生证据，P8.338 已补 source-copy temp CRC failure 的同类卫生证据，P8.339 已补 workbook planned removal 后 source-loaded full worksheet chunks 在 catalog preflight 阶段失败且不消费 chunks，P8.340 已补 invalid planned workbook catalog 下同一 chunk handoff 失败且不消费 chunks，P8.341 已补 planned sheet id 使用错误 namespace 时同一 chunk handoff 失败且不消费 chunks，P8.342 已补 planned sheet id 只有普通未命名空间 `id` 时同一 chunk handoff 失败且不消费 chunks，P8.343 已补 planned workbook `.rels` 指向未注册 worksheet part 时同一 chunk handoff 失败且不消费 chunks。剩余阻塞项
  主要是 operation-mixing guardrails 和最终 public-header implementation tests。只有发现真实证据缺口时，才继续补 source
  materialization / failure-before-state-change guardrail 场景或小型 save-as handoff
  缺口。当前策略先冻结为：
  `erase_cell()` 只是移除 sparse record，不是 tombstone；`CellValue::blank()` 是显式
  blank replacement cell；canonical non-zero source style ids 会验证 source
  styles.xml `cellXfs` 后做 same-workbook numeric passthrough，explicit source
  `s="0"` 归一化为 no style handle，但只有 exact token 被接受；empty / padded
  / signed / leading-zero / entity-encoded / duplicate / qualified source style
  attributes、missing/invalid styles metadata 和 out-of-range ids 仍 fail，不做
  migrate / merge。
  当前已固定的 source dependency/shape fail policy 不能写成 migration、repair 或
  preservation。仍只做内部回归，不公开 `WorksheetEditor`，不处理 sharedStrings/style
  migration 或 relationship repair。
- 禁止：不承诺大文件随机低内存编辑、不承诺公式计算、sharedStrings 索引迁移、
  style 合并、calcChain rebuild 或 relationship repair。

F3 existing-file feature support policy：
- 目标：把已有 workbook 中的 styles、sharedStrings、hyperlinks、tables、images、
  comments、drawings、VBA、custom XML 和 unknown extensions 先定义成
  preserve / audit / fail / edit 的支持矩阵。
- 执行方式：先补政策和 fixture coverage，再决定是否开放语义编辑；新增对象时优先
  证明未知和未修改 parts 保留。

F4 Streaming feature API polish：
- 目标：继续打磨 new-workbook streaming API 的低风险功能、示例和文档，但不让
  convenience API 破坏 row-order hot path。
- 候选：补充常用 worksheet metadata 示例、样式/图片/表格组合示例、错误文案和
  Doxygen；新增功能必须先说明是否进入 worksheet row/cell 热路径。

当前优先级判断：如果一个任务只是“跑更大的 benchmark”或“优化现有热路径”，但没有
服务于上述 API / 功能契约，应暂缓到 C6；如果一个任务能让 public API 更稳定、
功能边界更清晰或 existing-file editing 更可解释，应优先拆小推进。

### C0 状态校准与验证基线

目标：每次进入实现前，先确认文档、public header、CMake、CTest 和当前脏工作树的事实一致。

当前事实：
- `WorkbookEditor` 已是 public 窄 Patch facade，不再是纯 future 名称。
- `PackageReader` / `PackageEditor` / `EditPlan` / dependency audits 仍是 internal。
- `CellValue`、internal `CellStore`、`CellStoreOptions`、standalone `<sheetData>`
  emission 和 `CellStore` 到 by-name `PackageEditor` handoff 已有基础。
- P8 event reader / transformer / bounded cell replacement / file-backed output handoff
  已有 internal foundation，但仍不是 public low-memory large-file editor。

验收：
- `rg` 搜索无旧口径：`Workbook::open`、`addSheet`、`writeRows`、`saveAs`、
  `no public WorkbookEditor` 等不应出现在当前 API 说明里。
- `git diff --check` 通过。
- 若触碰代码，至少运行对应 CTest；若只改文档，说明未跑 CTest。

### C1 当前 public `WorkbookEditor` Patch facade 硬化

状态：已完成。

目标：把已落地的 public facade 固定稳定，而不是立刻扩展成完整 editor。

范围：
- 围绕 `WorkbookEditor::open()`、`worksheet_names()`、`has_worksheet()`、
  `replace_sheet_data()`、`rename_sheet()`、`save_as()` 维护 Doxygen、README 示例、
  public structure tests 和错误路径测试。
- 明确 `rename_sheet()` 只是 workbook sheet catalog name rewrite，不是语义 rename。
- 明确 `replace_sheet_data()` 只生成 whole-`<sheetData>`，不迁移 sharedStrings、
  不合并 styles、不修复 relationships、不重算 ranges。
- `replace_sheet_data()` 对缺失 sheet name 先按 current planned catalog 做 public
  facade preflight，再构建 replacement payload，避免 missing-sheet 场景先触发
  replacement guardrail 或污染 pending replacement diagnostics。
- `rename_sheet()` 失败路径必须保持 failure-before-state-change：duplicate /
  invalid rename 失败后不迁移 replacement diagnostics、不改变 catalog / edit summary，
  只更新 `last_edit_error()` 为当前失败诊断。
- `replace_sheet_data()` 的 styled `CellValue` 只把 caller-supplied non-default
  `StyleId` 原样写成 cell `s="N"`，explicit default `StyleId{}` 不写 `s="0"`，
  且 source `xl/styles.xml` 只做 byte preservation；这不是 style id validation、
  migration、merge 或 existing-file style preservation。
- `replace_sheet_data()` 的 explicit `CellValue::blank()` 会写出 empty `<c/>`，
  可携带 caller-supplied non-default style；空 row vector 只推进输入 row mapping，
  不写出 explicit empty `<row>`，也不等同 tombstone / erase / random editing。
- `save_as()` 失败路径必须保持输出提交前状态卫生：输出路径被拒绝或写出失败后不清空
  queued replacement / rename，不改变 `worksheet_catalog()` / `pending_worksheet_edits()`，
  也不更新或清空 `last_edit_error()`；调用方修正输出路径后仍可继续 `save_as()`。
- `save_as()` 在没有 queued public edits 时只做 reader-backed roundtrip copy；
  解压后的 source package entries 应保持一致，但这不是原地 atomic save、public
  `PackageEditor` 或完整 preservation API。

禁止：
- 不新增 `WorksheetEditor`。
- 不新增 `get_cell()` / `set_cell()` random editing。
- 不把 internal `PackageEditor` 暴露为 public API。

### C2 Patch preservation / dependency audit 缺口补齐

状态：当前收口批次已完成；后续只按新增对象或失败状态卫生缺口重开。

目标：继续补 existing-file editing 的保真与审计证据，先保证“不破坏未知对象”，再谈语义编辑。

范围：
- 以 `docs/PATCH_PRESERVATION_COVERAGE.md` 为 fixture 明细权威来源。
- 按对象补缺口：comments / threaded comments / persons、printerSettings、
  OLE / controls、VML、charts、VBA、custom XML、unknown extensions、tables、
  drawings / media、sharedStrings / styles。
- 对每类对象只声明 preserve / audit / fail，不声明 repair / pruning / semantic editing。
- 新增测试时优先落在 `fastxlsx.package_editor`，并保持 failure-before-state-change。

推荐执行顺序：
1. comments / threaded comments / persons 的 ordinary replace / remove / ordering：
   当前已有 `test_package_editor_replaces_comments_and_preserves_worksheet_links()`、
   `test_package_editor_removes_comments_and_preserves_worksheet_links()`、
   `test_package_editor_comments_replacement_restores_prior_removal()`、
   `test_package_editor_comments_removal_overrides_prior_replacement()`、
   comments / threaded comments / persons repeated replacement 状态卫生，以及
   threaded comments / persons replace-remove 和 same-path ordering 回归；后续只补真实缺口。
2. worksheet-owned VML / printerSettings / OLE / controls 的保留与显式 removal 审计：
   当前已有 background/header-footer VML、printerSettings、OLE/control preservation、
   explicit removal、same-path ordering 和 repeated replacement 状态卫生回归；后续只补
   未覆盖对象或失败状态卫生。
3. charts / tables / drawings / media 的 linked-part 保留与 relationship audit：
   当前批次已完成覆盖核对。`test_package_editor_replaces_drawing_and_preserves_linked_media_entries()`、
   drawing remove / replacement ordering、media replace / remove / ordering、table
   replace / remove / ordering、chart replace / remove / ordering，以及 percent-decoded
   drawing replace / remove / ordering 已覆盖 planned-output 快照、remove/replace
   state hygiene、URI-qualified / percent-decoded target、content type side effects、
   no invented owner `.rels` 和 output `PackageReader` 重读证据。
4. custom XML、unknown extensions、external links、pivot table / pivot cache、sharedStrings / styles、VBA 的 preserve / fail / ordering：
   已覆盖 custom XML、unknown extensions、externalLink、pivot table / pivot cache、sharedStrings / styles 和 VBA 的
   remove/replacement 反向顺序、owner `.rels` omission/audit 以及 repeated
   replacement 状态卫生；worksheet-owned object 这一批也已补齐 OLE / control /
   background picture 的 repeated replacement 状态卫生。当前收口批次未发现已知对象级
   replacement/order 缺口；后续若新增对象或 `ReferencePolicyAction::Fail` 状态卫生缺口，
   再按小切片重开。

当前阶段的判断标准是“对象级保真和审计覆盖是否完整”，不是“是否新增了完整对象生命周期”。

本轮验收：
- `fastxlsx.package_editor` 覆盖 linked-object preservation、replacement/remove/order、
  repeated replacement state hygiene、relationship/content-type audit 和
  `ReferencePolicyAction::Fail` no-state-pollution。
- `docs/PATCH_PRESERVATION_COVERAGE.md` 是对象级明细权威来源；本文件只记录任务队列状态。
- 默认 `windows-nmake-release` 构建与 CTest 已通过，作为 C2 当前收口批次的回归基线。

禁止：
- 不把 preservation 测试写成完整 object lifecycle 支持。
- 不自动 prune inbound relationships 或 orphan parts，除非有单独设计和测试证明安全。

### C3 public editor 扩展决策门

状态：首个扩展决策已完成；后续仍作为 `WorkbookEditor` / `WorksheetEditor` 分叉门。

目标：在扩大 public API 前，先决定扩展方向和 guardrail，而不是顺手加方法。

当前已选方向：
- 扩展当前 `WorkbookEditor`，先落地 coarse public diagnostics。已实现
  `has_pending_changes()` / `pending_change_count()`，它们只表示 public facade 是否已有
  成功编辑，以及粗粒度 pending-save 数量，不暴露 internal `EditPlan`。
- replacement payload 级 guardrails 已交给 C4 窄切片落地；不把它扩展成 future
  `WorksheetEditor` random-edit guardrail，也不把 internal `EditPlan` 暴露给 public API。
- future `WorksheetEditor` 仍保留为后续小文件 random cell editing 方向，但前置
  workbook-level guardrails、load/materialization contract 和 save-as handoff 仍未进入本轮。

前置条件：
- C1 public facade 当前行为稳定。
- C2 对 sharedStrings、styles、relationships、calc metadata、range metadata 的
  preserve/audit/fail 策略清晰。
- 文档能说明内存增长、失败语义和不支持大文件低内存随机访问。

完成条件：
- 下一步扩展方向已经写入 `TASK_BREAKDOWN.md` 和 `API_DESIGN_AND_DOCUMENTATION.md`。
- `WorkbookEditor` 扩展的确切新增方法已经列出：`has_pending_changes()` /
  `pending_change_count()`，并明确它们只是 coarse diagnostics；replacement payload
  级 options / diagnostics 由 C4 承接。
- `WorksheetEditor` 仍未实现，且文档先写清 load/materialization contract、大小限制和
  save-as handoff。
- C3 现在保留为后续 `WorkbookEditor` / `WorksheetEditor` 分叉门，而不是当前阻塞项。

### C4 In-memory random editor 内部到 public 的窄切片

状态：public Patch facade guardrail / diagnostics 首片完成并通过默认 CTest；真正
In-memory random editor 仍未实现。

目标：把已有 internal `CellStore` foundation 逐步推进到真正小文件 random editor，
但不把它误用为大文件路径。

当前已完成：
- `WorkbookEditorOptions` public 首片已落地，但只作用于
  `WorkbookEditor::replace_sheet_data()` 的 replacement payload 构建：
  `max_replacement_cells` 和 `replacement_memory_budget_bytes`。
- `WorkbookEditor::open(path, options)` 已落地；这些 options 不加载 source worksheet
  cells、不提供 random editing，也不是 workbook-level / worksheet-level In-memory 限制。
- `pending_replacement_cell_count()` 和
  `pending_replacement_worksheet_names()` / `has_pending_replacement()` /
  `estimated_pending_replacement_memory_usage()` 已落地；它们只统计最终 queued
  replacement payload per planned sheet，不统计 source workbook cells、renamed-only
  sheets、relationships、sharedStrings/styles 或 save-time package assembly。
- internal source-backed worksheet materialization 已有首片：
  `load_cell_store_from_worksheet_chunks()` / `load_cell_store_from_worksheet_xml()`
  可从 bounded worksheet XML 事件流建立 `CellStore`，
  `load_cell_store_from_workbook_sheet()` 可经 `PackageReader` workbook catalog
  按 sheet name 定位 worksheet part 后复用同一路径；当前只覆盖有限 cell value，
  不加载 sharedStrings/style metadata，也不是 public editor。
- internal `CellStore::try_cell(row, column)` 已明确 missing vs explicit blank：
  nullptr 表示 sparse store 中没有 record，explicit blank 是非空 `Blank` record；
  `find_cell()` 保留为兼容 alias。
- internal source-loaded save-as handoff smoke 已覆盖：从 `PackageReader` sheet-name
  helper 加载 source worksheet 到 `CellStore`，执行小范围 mutation，再通过现有
  by-name `sheetData` Patch helper 输出，验证 stale calcChain cleanup 和 unknown bytes
  preservation。
- internal blank-vs-erase policy smoke 已覆盖：source cell 被
  `CellValue::blank()` 覆盖时写出 empty cell，source cell 被 `erase_cell()` 删除时
  从 replacement `<sheetData>` 中省略；这仍不是 tombstone、style preservation 或
  public `WorksheetEditor` 语义。
- F2.4 loader dependency guardrail 已进一步固定：source cell 只要携带 `s`
  attribute 就 fail，包括已读到前置普通 cell 后出现的 explicit default `s="0"`；
  source sharedStrings、unsupported cell type 和 invalid boolean 也固定为同类
  fail-before-return guardrail，失败不暴露 partial `CellStore`。这不是 source
  style preservation、style id migration、style merge、sharedStrings migration 或
  value repair。
- Focused loader coordinate coverage now also rejects zero-row cell references,
  last-row overflow references, non-column-first references, and invalid row
  `r` values before future public editor materialization depends on this path.
- Focused loader materialization coverage now also verifies that
  `CellStoreOptions::max_cells` and `memory_budget_bytes` are enforced during
  worksheet loading rather than only during direct `CellStore::set_cell()` calls.
- Focused loader source-shape coverage now also rejects duplicate source cell
  references before returning a `CellStore`, rather than allowing
  `CellStore::set_cell()` to silently overwrite earlier source XML payload.
- Focused loader value-wrapper coverage now rejects duplicate scalar `<v>`,
  formula `<f>`, and inline text `<t>` wrappers in one source cell instead of
  concatenating ambiguous source XML payloads.
- Focused loader row-shape coverage now rejects duplicate explicit row `r`
  values before future public editor materialization depends on this path.
- Focused loader key-attribute coverage now rejects duplicate inspected
  unqualified `r` / `t` attributes before materializing source cells.
- Focused loader row-order coverage now rejects out-of-order explicit row `r`
  values instead of letting sparse-store emission silently sort source rows.
- Focused loader cell-order coverage now rejects source cell references that
  move backwards instead of letting sparse-store emission silently sort source
  cells.
- Focused loader formula-shape coverage now rejects unknown source formula
  attributes and empty formula text instead of materializing unsupported
  metadata shapes as ordinary empty formulas.
- Focused loader row-scope coverage now rejects source cells outside row
  elements instead of materializing schema-invalid loose cells.
- Focused loader metadata-attribute coverage now rejects unsupported source
  row/cell metadata attributes instead of dropping row height or cell metadata
  during sparse materialization.
- Focused loader value-wrapper attribute coverage now rejects unsupported scalar
  `<v>` and inline text `<t>` attributes, while keeping `xml:space` on inline
  text loadable as plain semantic text.
- Package-backed loader state-hygiene coverage now also proves workbook catalog
  failures for corrupt workbook/worksheet ZIP reads, duplicate sheet names,
  missing sheet relationship ids, non-worksheet relationship types, registered
  non-worksheet targets, external targets, and URI-qualified targets preserve a
  separately opened `PackageEditor` as copy-original without calc policy, notes,
  manifest, or output byte pollution.

推荐切片顺序：
1. public replacement-payload options / diagnostics contract：已完成当前
   `WorkbookEditorOptions` 窄语义；future In-memory `max_cells` /
   `memory_budget_bytes`、`cell_count()`、`estimated_memory_usage()` 仍需另行冻结。
2. internal source-backed worksheet load prototype：从一个 worksheet 建立 `CellStore`，
   只覆盖有限 cell value，不处理完整 worksheet 语义。当前首片完成。
3. random mutation model：`try_cell` / `set_cell` / `erase_cell` / blank 已有
   internal store 语义；tombstone / style-preservation 当前策略已冻结为
   erase-removes-record、blank-writes-empty-cell、canonical non-zero source style
   ids numeric passthrough、source `s="0"` normalizes to no style handle。
4. internal save-as handoff smoke：把 source worksheet load、small mutation 和
   existing by-name `sheetData` Patch helper 串成一条内部回归。当前首片完成。
5. public `WorksheetEditor` 首片：只在上述 guardrail 和 save-as contract 有测试后进入。

禁止：
- 不把 current `WorkbookEditor::replace_sheet_data()` 写成 random editing。
- 不承诺 sharedStrings/style migration、formula evaluation、calcChain rebuild 或
  relationship repair。

### C5 大 worksheet 低内存 rewrite 真正流式化

状态：可验证实现继续推进；source-entry file-backed extraction、stored source-entry
direct ZIP-entry chunk-source input、output-side file-backed chunk handoff、planned-input
materialized guard、event-reader retained-window chunk-source input、
transformer pull-based chunk-source adapters、PackageEditor output-pass /
dependency-dimension / output-side relationship-id audit / worksheet root validation chunk-source
handoff first slices、planned staged chunk input chunk-source first slice，以及 P8.27
历史 queued planned replacement string chunk-source first slice 已有测试；当前 worksheet-aware
`replace_worksheet_part()` 成功排队后已把 planned worksheet payload 收窄为
PackageEditor-owned file-backed staged chunk，且该 staged 分支的 root validation、
payload dependency audit 和 relationship-id audit 已改为从 staged chunk source
重复扫描；explicit staged worksheet chunks helper 也已改为从真实 chunks 扫描
validation/audit。P8.37/P8.39 曾把 ordinary `replace_part()` 针对 worksheet part 的
replacement 收窄并路由为 worksheet-aware file-backed staged validation/audit/calc
metadata path；P8.48 已进一步删除该 ordinary worksheet string entry，generic
`replace_part(std::string)` 现在拒绝 worksheet target。
P8.40 进一步删除了 prevalidated worksheet chunk commit 里借
`replace_part(..., empty string)` 记录 replacement 的内部技巧，改为直接记录 staged
chunk replacement；ordinary worksheet `replace_part()` 的空 payload 现在会在
worksheet guardrail 处失败，不再保留 generic empty-string 绕行口。

并同步 EditPlan / manifest / stale-removal cleanup，不再先排队空 ordinary
replacement。

旧 worksheet-only 语义。
P8.76 同步把 internal `PackageEntryReplacement` 的 materialized string field 改名为

P8.82 曾把 `PackageEditor::save_as()` 输出组包阶段的 metadata-only source copy

source-copy `reader.read_entry()` fallback。
P8.83 继续把 internal `WorksheetCellReplacement` / `WorksheetTransformAction` 的单
cell replacement payload 字段改名为 `materialized_replacement_cell_xml`，明确该

P8.128 已继续把该单 cell payload 从 transformer / PackageEditor action / plan 的
裸 `std::string_view` 字段收敛为 `WorksheetCellReplacementPayload` view；P8.162 后
该 backing 可是 bounded caller-owned multi-chunk single-cell XML，但内部状态仍不传播
raw replacement string field。P8.132 继续把该 payload 的消费面收窄为 replayable
chunk view：preflight 只在 single-cell byte limit 内临时 materialize 校验 `<c>`
root / `r` selector，但 PackageEditor payload audit、relationship scan 和 output

P8.163 又把 multi-chunk payload byte-size 累加与 preflight materialization 自身的
limit guard 固化到 payload 边界，防止 chunked payload 绕过 single-cell guard 或
触发 size overflow。P8.164 继续把 PackageEditor replacement cell payload scanner
的 retained-window capacity check 收敛为显式 guard，并让 scanner failure 如果发生
就带着 replacement cell XML context 传播，而不是静默丢失 payload audit。P8.172
继续让该 scanner 按 bounded slices 消费 caller chunks，避免单个长 comment /
CDATA / PI ignored-markup chunk 在收缩到 terminator tail 前先因整块大小失败。P8.173
把 sheetData start-tag scanner 做同类 bounded-slice hardening，避免 inline-string
comment / CDATA / PI 中的 fake `<c t="s">` / `<f>` 文本因为单个长 ignored-markup
chunk 先触发 retained-window 失败或误进入 payload audit。P8.174 又让 output-side
relationship-id scanner 在已有 retained partial tag 时按 bounded slices 续接下一

buffer 而失败。P8.175 继续补齐 staged memory chunk replay hygiene：memory-backed
`PackageEntryChunk` 现在也在 `PackageEntryChunkReader` replay 时校验 recorded
expected-size，即使没有 recorded expected-CRC metadata，也会拒绝 stale size
contract。P8.176 继续补 empty memory chunk 的 expected-CRC replay guard，避免空
memory chunk 在 recorded expected-CRC metadata stale 时因不输出 payload chunk 而跳过
CRC contract。P8.177 则修正 transformer output emitter 对 event-reader synthetic
self-closing end events 的处理，避免 pass-through 的 `<c/>`、`<row/>` 或
`<sheetData/>` 被 start/end 两个事件各输出一次。P8.165
进一步把 bounded replacement cell XML 的截断 tag、未闭合 comment 和不平衡元素
前移到 transformer preflight 阶段拒绝。P8.166 继续让 output-side
relationship-id scanner 在 emitted chunks 之间保留 bounded XML tail，使被 caller
chunk 边界切开的完整 tag/comment 能继续解析为具体 relationship audit。
P8.84 继续给 `current_planned_materialized_workbook_xml()` 增加 purpose 参数，并把
source workbook read 包进 `read_materialized_source_workbook_xml()`，让 workbook
sheet catalog / rename / calc metadata 这类小型 XML 物化边界按用途可见。
P8.85 继续把 sheetData replacement 和 cell replacement 里重复的 source-entry /

P8.86 继续把 `save_as()` 输出组包阶段的 active replacement 物化边界收敛到

P8.87 继续让 `planned_output()` 显式暴露 active materialized replacement：
`PackageEditorOutputEntryPlan::materialized_replacement` 会标记非 worksheet / metadata

P8.88 继续给该 marker 增加 `materialized_replacement_reason`：active workbook

只允许 `[Content_Types].xml`、package `_rels/.rels` 和 source-owned `.rels`

P8.130 随后把旧的 local-rewrite-named sheetData size guard 重命名为

大小限制。
P8.131 继续加固 `PackageReader::extract_entry_to_file()` 的 output-state 边界：
该 internal helper 现在先写同目录 sibling temp file，只有 chunk-source 读取、
CRC/size 校验和文件 finalize 全部成功后才提交到目标路径；CRC/read/write/commit
失败会清理 temp 并保留既有 output file，目标路径已经是 directory 时会在读取 entry
前失败并保留目录内容；目标路径与 source package exact / path-equivalent 时也会
前置失败，避免 internal extraction helper 把源 `.xlsx` 覆盖成某个 entry payload。
P8.133 继续加固 `PackageEditor::save_as()` 的最终输出提交边界：输出 package
先写到目标同目录 sibling temp，`write_package()` 成功后才 success-only commit
到目标路径；copy-original source-copy 临时文件和输出 sibling temp 在 writer
失败或 copy-original 读取失败后都会清理，既有 output file 和 queued edit state
保持可复用。
P8.134 继续把 `PackageReader::extract_entry_to_file()` 的目标路径状态前置化：
输出 parent path 必须在读取 entry chunks 前已经存在且是目录；missing parent 或
file parent 会先失败，不触发 entry chunk source / CRC 读取，也不会创建输出文件。
P8.135 继续加固 `PackageReader::read_entry()` 的 materialization helper：消费
chunk-source 聚合成 `std::string` 时会拒绝空 chunk、少发字节或超发字节，避免
reader-side chunk-source 统一路径隐藏 size-contract 破坏。
P8.136 把同一 size-contract 防线扩展到 `PackageReader::extract_entry_to_file()`：
file-backed extraction helper 现在也在提交 sibling temp 前验证 chunk-source 精确写满
expected size，失败时清理 temp 并保留既有 output file。
P8.137 继续把 size-contract 防线推进到 `PackageEntryChunk` staged payload：
worksheet / package-part staged chunks 会在预检时记录 expected size，后续
`PackageEntryChunkReader` planned-input 消费和 `PackageWriter` 写出阶段都会拒绝
file-backed chunk 被截断或扩展后的短读/超读，失败不污染既有 planned edit state。

P8.47 继续把 `replace_worksheet_sheet_data()` 的 replacement `<sheetData>` payload

P8.48 随后删除 direct/by-name sheetData string helper；public `WorkbookEditor`

`replace_part(std::string)` 现在拒绝 worksheet part，避免 worksheet replacement
继续从 generic string API 潜入；非 worksheet ordinary replacement 仍可保持
string-backed planned input，因此这仍不代表 full planned-input low-memory pipeline。
  P8.49 删除/替换了 generic planned-part XML materialization helper，把可物化边界
  明确收窄为 workbook small XML：by-name sheet catalog、calc metadata 和 sheet

  P8.52 继续收紧 sheetData chunk-source 失败语义：direct sheetData helper 会先确认

  P8.63/P8.67 让 `save_as()` 的最终 materialization 边界同时拒绝 source worksheet
  part string replacement 和 package-entry string replacement；P8.68 曾让
  `planned_output()` 暴露 invalid legacy worksheet string state，P8.70 已进一步删除
